items.name: Wicked Popular Animation Pack
items.description:
Featuring "Toss, Toss" 
©2024 UNIVERSAL PICTURES ALL RIGHTS RESERVED 
Become a magical witch and defy gravity in the immersive RP experience: http://www.roblox.com/wicked

items.name: Mage Animation Package
items.description: This animation pack only works with R15 avatars. This guy is spellbinding - his magic show really put a spell on me!

items.name: Korblox Mage Staff
items.description: Use the powerful dark magic of the Korblox to summon a row of spears from thin air!  If they don't hit your opponent on the way down, they'll hit them as they explode!

items.name: Rainbow Periastron Omega
items.description: The sword men use to fight angry magical unicorns... in space.

items.name: Darkest Arts Sword
items.description: A dark magic possesses this sword. Use it as a sword or use its dark magic to destroy the artifacts of others.

items.name: Evil Knight Sword
items.description: This blade draws power from the user, its cursed blade growing stronger as the wielder is lost to despair.

items.name: Magical Umbrella
items.description: Float away with this magical umbrella.  Click to do a twirling trick. Jump while moving to go farther. Click a lot to make it float away! (does not make the player fly)

items.name: Winged Magical Staff
items.description: The perfect tool for fighting evil in the daylight or moonlight. Double jump to fly.  Control using 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or arrow keys. Click to shoot neon pink orbs at your enemies!

items.name: Golden Carrot Necklace
items.description: 24 carrot magic.

items.name: Black Knight Helmet
items.description: "THOU SHALL NOT PASS!"

items.name: Arabian Knight Scimitar
items.description: "Son of infamy! Every bone in your body shall be broken if you continue to defy me!"

items.name: Rainbowrath: The Avenger
items.description: This magical rainbow unicorn blade will mean the end of all your foes. Click to swing the sword dealing 12 to 16 damage. Double tap the space bar to get wings to appear, which you can use to fly while swinging your sword!

items.name: Golden Magic Carpet
items.description: Ride your own golden carpet through the skies of Roblox! Use the 'W', 'A', 'S', 'D' or arrow keys to control the direction. A magical golden trail will track your path through the sky.

items.name: Potion Satchel
items.description:
When out adventuring, ya always gotta make sure to have your three different magic potions; Health, Health 2 and Purple!

3.0 version: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/6409853019/Potion-Satchel-3-0

Potion Backpack: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/6501751475/Potion-Backpack

items.name: Azure Dragon's Magic Slayer
items.description: Click to deal your foes 16 to 22 points of damage.  If you successfully blox your foe, they become a  skeleton! Click and hold to charge a special attack which creates a magic purple portal in front of you. It'll then suck in objects and players and instantly kill them if they come in contact with it!

items.name: Korblox Deathspeaker's Spell Book
items.description: Cast one of three dangerous spells at your enemies - the Knights of Redcliff!

items.name: Astral Cloak of Transportation
items.description: All magical secrets are held by the Wizards of the Astral Isles, but they don't mind lending out this cloak.  Just don't ask how it gets you from A to B.

items.name: The Hematite Eye
items.description: One night the hematite knight will come for you, and it won't be a good night!

items.name: Knights of the Splintered Skies: Wind Summoner
items.description: This extremely powerful horn summons a row of tornadoes that will destroy everything (and everyone) in their path!
